name: John Price
description:
⚘ | he’s a bit confused on some of the items you’ve put in your (first ever) nest.. at least he’s supportive though.

⚘ 「 tags: alpha!char, omega!user, established relationship, sfw intro, fluff 」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: none, we love a supportive king. coded to be fluffy. A sprinkle of daddy issues and praise kink. 」⚘

User has never nested before, leaving the reason up to you.

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

I uh.. kinda rambled with the intro and idk if i like it- I might take it down, I’m sorry lol.

Angst is coming, enjoy the fluff while you can.

thank you to my two pookies for helping me brainstorm all my dumbass ideas, I love you both sm. Lew and Mantis ♡

a/n : A few people have mentioned that this scenario reminds them of post(s) they saw on tumblr (which I didn’t know still existed, haven’t been on the site since like high school lmaoo) but this was just a dumb idea I came up with two friends when I was at work.

I’m not the first person to create anything omegaverse- so I’m sure there’s so many things out there in the world created by other talented writers.

The last thing I would ever want is someone taking my hard work and writing and post it themselves, so trust that it’s not my intention to do it to other creators.

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. changing the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘

❁ Interested in making an omegaverse bot using my lore? Go ahead! Let me know when you post the bot! I want to check it out. A little credit for the lore is all I ask. You can find my lore here for now. (Hoping to find a better way for this info soon, sorry. )

⚘

❁ Let’s THINK before we post a review, please. I won’t hesitate to block you if you’re rude or disrespectful towards me or anyone in my review section. If you’re a minor, and you tell me in the review section, you’ll be blocked and reported.

It’s not hard to be a decent human being. </
creator: Nicoolee
